title: PEDIATRIC DENTISTRY - 211info
text: OHSU DENTAL CLINIC PEDIATRIC DENTISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric dentistry services performed by dental students under the direct supervision of dentists. Services include oral evaluation, assessments, teeth cleaning, fluoride treatments, sealants, fillings, space maintainers, athletic mouth guards, and sedation dentistry. 2730 SW Moody Avenue Skourtes Tower Portland, OR 972015042 Eligibility: Ages 0-14 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:45pm (503) 418-4334 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 418-4334 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by procedure; no free care. Accepts most dental insurance plans, including Oregon (OHP) and Washington (Apple Health) State Medicaid. Payment is due at the time of service. Care Credit payment plans are available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clark, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Patient entrance is on the bottom floor at the corner of Southwest Moody Avenue and Southwest Meade Street. Located on the MAX Orange Line and the Portland Streetcar line. Services: Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OHSU DENTAL CLINICS SPECIALTY MEDICINE - ORTHODONTIC SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - SPECIAL NEEDS DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OHSU DENTAL CLINIC
